success_criteria: run-validator-b no longer passes the full prompt as a CLI argv value.
run-validator-b rejects sandbox modes other than read-only and enables Gemini CLI sandboxing with the boolean --sandbox flag.
run-validator-b applies a total embedded context byte budget and marks omitted files.
run-validator-b rejects Validator-A/Codex references in refs and changed_files, not just selected phrases.
run-validator-b prompt includes the validator-result schema content or an equivalent schema contract.
run-validator-a validates github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason as required result fields.
validate-handoffs discovers Validator-B fixtures without a single task-specific hardcode.
node --check, Validator-B dry-run, audit:harness, and Validator-A validation pass.
known_risks: Gemini CLI is not installed locally, so live Validator-B model smoke remains a follow-up task.
Validator-A may not be able to execute node/npm in its own sandbox; validation-evidence.json records the parent-session command results.
forbidden_context: Do not include secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or PII.
Do not merge main from this validation step.
Do not treat Gemini CLI resource failure as Validator-B FAIL.
